hero.desc: Danmotech provides advanced decentralized sewage and wastewater treatment systems for residential, commercial, and municipal applications worldwide.

products.subtitle: Our Solutions
products.title: Product Series
products.desc: From compact household units to large-scale municipal plants, we have the right solution for every wastewater challenge.

icell.name: iCELL Series
icell.desc: Compact STP plants designed for single households, rural areas, villas, and small residential communities. Easy to install and maintain.

icube.name: iCUBE Series
icube.desc: Containerized sewage treatment plants for distributed populations, camps, remote areas, and commercial facilities.

ishell.name: iSHELL Series
ishell.desc: Advanced modular sewage treatment adopting German fixed-bed technology. Flexible combinations for various capacities.

wwtp.name: Waste Water Treatment Plant
wwtp.desc: Full-scale wastewater treatment plants integrating world-class technologies for municipal and industrial applications.

tech.subtitle: Why Danmotech
tech.title: Advanced Technology
tech.desc: Combining German engineering excellence with decades of wastewater treatment expertise.

germanTech.title: German Technology
germanTech.desc: Advanced fixed-bed biological treatment technology from Germany.

ecoFriendly.title: Eco-Friendly
ecoFriendly.desc: Low energy consumption with minimal environmental impact.

highEfficiency.title: High Efficiency
highEfficiency.desc: 99% treatment efficiency meeting stringent discharge standards.

easyMaintenance.title: Easy Maintenance
easyMaintenance.desc: Automated systems requiring minimal operator intervention.

certifiedQuality.title: Certified Quality
certifiedQuality.desc: Internationally tested and approved by leading authorities.

waterReuse.title: Water Reuse
waterReuse.desc: Treated water suitable for irrigation and non-potable reuse.

refs.subtitle: Case Studies
refs.title: Our References
refs.desc: Proven track record across residential, commercial, and municipal projects worldwide.

partner.subtitle: Partnership
partner.title: Become a Danmotech Partner
partner.desc: We're looking for experienced distributors and dealers worldwide to bring our advanced wastewater treatment solutions to new markets.

globalNetwork.title: Global Network
globalNetwork.desc: Join our international dealer network across 30+ countries.

growingMarket.title: Growing Market
growingMarket.desc: Tap into the rapidly expanding water treatment industry.

fullSupport.title: Full Support
fullSupport.desc: Technical training, marketing materials, and ongoing support.

contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.desc: Ready to discuss your wastewater treatment needs? Our team of experts is here to help you find the perfect solution.

success.title: Message Sent!
success.desc: We'll get back to you shortly.

footer.desc: Professional sewage & waste water treatment solution provider with German technology.

detail.ctaDesc: Contact our team for a customized solution tailored to your project requirements.
